summary: Frontend testing of new FTLP Showroom page. All 10 requested features tested and working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Showroom page fully functional with all 8 categories, tier filtering, search, add to build, drawer, modal, and save build features working.

Dashboard Equipment Showroom Card.card_visible: PASS - Equipment Showroom card visible at top of dashboard
Dashboard Equipment Showroom Card.new_badge: PASS - NEW badge visible on card

Showroom Page Load.page_loads: PASS - Page loads with 'The Showroom' text visible
Showroom Page Load.default_category: PASS - Chassis category displayed by default with 6 items

Tier Filters.standard_filter: PASS - Filters to standard tier only
Tier Filters.premium_filter: PASS - Filters to premium tier only (2 items in chassis)
Tier Filters.elite_filter: PASS - Filters to elite tier only

Search Functionality.search_input: PASS - Input field found and functional
Search Functionality.clear_search: PASS - Clearing search restores all products

Add to Build.add_button: PASS - 'Add to Build' buttons on product cards work
Add to Build.selection_state: PASS - Selected items show '✓ Selected' state
Add to Build.build_count: PASS - Sidebar shows correct item count and total

Your Build Drawer.drawer_toggle: PASS - Drawer opens on 'Your Build' click
Your Build Drawer.drawer_content: PASS - Shows selected items with names and prices
Your Build Drawer.item_total: PASS - Shows correct total ($70,500 for 2 items)

Product Detail Modal.modal_open: PASS - Clicking product card opens modal
Product Detail Modal.modal_content: PASS - Shows product name, tier, specs, dimensions, features, price
Product Detail Modal.modal_add_button: PASS - 'Add to Build' button in modal works

Save Build.save_button: PASS - Save Build button visible in drawer
Save Build.save_action: PASS - Clicking Save Build shows success toast
Save Build.toast_message: PASS - Toast shows 'Build saved! 2 items totaling $70,500'
